# lab-builder

Generates a project-based learning lab that helps the learner build a small artefact.

This skill is migrated from the original GRC Engineering Lab Builder.

## Use When

- The learner wants hands-on practice.
- The learner wants a portfolio project.
- The learner wants to learn a concept by building something small.

## Method

1. Gather the learner profile.
2. Clarify the learning objective.
3. Choose a learning-safe artefact.
4. Sequence the lab into small milestones.
5. Include reflection and recall checks.

## Inputs

- `profile-template.md`
- `templates/employed.md`
- `templates/job-seeking.md`
- `templates/career-transition.md`

## Must Include

- Project-based learning.
- Just-in-time learning.
- Reflection cycle.
- At least one active recall checkpoint.

## Must Not Do

Do not build an artefact that directly operates the learner's real programme. Use fictionalised data or a toy workflow when necessary.
